name: FormValidator.Views

values.name: error
values.comment: View field error (if any) as a list item.

values.name: errors
values.comment: View field errors (if any) as a unordered list.

values.name: field
values.comment: View field with errors (if any). To be used as a wrapper to field input field(s).
values.type: key -> Form key -> List String -> List (Html message) -> Html message

name: FormValidator.Validator

values.name: fieldErrors
values.comment: Answer all errors for a field.

values.name: fieldValue
values.comment: Answer single field value.

values.name: fieldValues
values.comment: Answer multiple field values.

values.name: init
values.comment: Initialize a new form field.

values.name: isFieldInvalid
values.comment: Answer if field is invalid.

values.name: isFormInvalid
values.comment: Answer if form is invalid.

values.name: updateAndValidateValue
values.comment: Answer single field value and validate it.
values.type: key -> Value -> Form key -> Form key

values.name: updateAndValidateValues
values.comment: Answer multiple field values and validate each.
values.type: key -> Values -> Form key -> Form key

values.name: updateValue
values.comment: Update single field value without validation.
values.type: key -> Value -> Form key -> Form key

values.name: updateValues
values.comment: Update multiple field values without validation.
values.type: key -> Values -> Form key -> Form key

values.name: validateField
values.comment: Validate field.

values.name: validateForm
values.comment: Validate form (including all fields).

name: FormValidator.Validators

values.name: isBetween
values.comment: Check if value is minimum and maximum.

values.name: isBlank
values.comment: Check if value is blank.

values.name: isEmail
values.comment: Check if value is an email address.

values.name: isEmpty
values.comment: Check if value is empty.

values.name: isExcluded
values.comment: Check if value is excluded from list.

values.name: isFloat
values.comment: Check if value is a float.

values.name: isGreaterThan
values.comment: Check if value is greater than minimum.

values.name: isIncluded
values.comment: Check if value is included in list.

values.name: isInteger
values.comment: Check if value is an integer.

values.name: isLengthGreaterThanEqualTo
values.comment: Check if value length is greater than or equal to minimum.

values.name: isLengthLessThanEqualTo
values.comment: Check if value length is less than or equal to maximum.

values.name: isLessThan
values.comment: Check if value is less than maximum.

name: FormValidator.Models
comment:
Form Validator component models.

@docs Form, Field, Validators, Validator, Values, Value, Errors, Error

aliases.name: Error
aliases.comment: The error message of an invalid value.

aliases.name: Errors
aliases.comment: The error messages of invalid values.

aliases.name: Field
aliases.comment:
The form field, identified by unique key, which stores a value, validators of that value,
and validation errors (if any).
aliases.type: { key : key, value : String, validators : Validators, errors : Errors }

aliases.name: Form
aliases.comment: The form model which stores a list of fields for input and validation.

aliases.name: Validator
aliases.comment: Validates value as either an error string (invalid) or nothing at all (valid).

aliases.name: Validators
aliases.comment: Convenience model for list of validators.

aliases.name: Values
aliases.comment: A list of values to be validated.

name: FormValidator.Patterns
comment:
Form Validator regular expression patterns.

@docs blank, email

values.name: blank
values.comment: Answer regular expression for blank string.

values.name: email
values.comment: Answer regular expression for email address.
